title: US Set to Object to Green Jet Fuel Recommendation at UN Aviation Council, Sources Say
content:
The US is expected to object this month to a recommendation at the UN aviation agency council that Washington says unfairly favors Brazilian corn farmers at the expense of US producers in development of green jet fuel, two sources familiar with the matter told Reuters.
One of the sources said the discussions could be resolved by a compromise. Still, Brazil's corn ethanol producers have warned that the disagreement could undermine global confidence in certification of sustainable aviation fuels.
author: Analysts Account
